title: How to convert seconds to hours:minutes:seconds
task: Display a raw seconds count (from a log, timer, or export) as readable hh:mm:ss.
keywords: convert seconds to hh mm ss excel

excel.note: Or =A2/86400 with the cell formatted as [h]:mm:ss to keep it numeric.

libreoffice.note: Format codes are case-insensitive here; "hh:mm:ss" also works.

explanation: Spreadsheets store time as a fraction of a day, so dividing seconds by 86,400 (seconds per day) converts the count into a time value; TEXT then formats it. 3,725 seconds is 1 hour, 2 minutes, 5 seconds. If a duration might exceed 24 hours, format the cell as [h]:mm:ss instead of using TEXT — the bracketed [h] stops hours wrapping around at 24.
